title: The Weekly Challenge - 177
task1_desc: You are given a positive number, `$n`.
task1_body: You are given a positive number, `$n`. Write a script to validate the given number against the included check digit. Please checkout the [**wikipedia page**](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Damm_algorithm) for information. #### Example 1 Input: $n = 5724 Output: 1 as it is valid number #### Example 2 Input: $n = 5727 Output: 0 as it is invalid number
task2_desc: Write a script to generate `first 20 Palindromic Prime Cyclops Numbers`.
task2_body:
Write a script to generate `first 20 Palindromic Prime Cyclops Numbers`.
> A cyclops number is a number with an odd number of digits that has a zero in the center only.
#### Output 101, 16061, 31013, 35053, 38083, 73037, 74047, 91019, 94049, 1120211, 1150511, 1160611, 1180811, 1190911, 1250521, 1280821, 1360631, 1390931, 1490941, 1520251
Last date to submit the solution **23:59 (UK Time) Sunday 14th August 2022**.
